title: Time tracking / adding sessions with more people at once at the same timeslots
excerpt:
When we are working on an item or subitem with several people, we can’t register the time per user, only one time is possible. 
If it’s possible to put in all times worked on that item, that’s better. Maybe in the sense …

posts.author: WeClo (Wesley Cloostermans)
posts.cookedHtml:
When we are working on an item or subitem with several people, we can’t register the time per user, only one time is possible.

If it’s possible to put in all times worked on that item, that’s better. Maybe in the sense of one person who uses time tracking where the others have to put in the time manually.
